description: Ant Design is a React UI library providing 80+ enterprise-class components. Access component documentation, design tokens, theme customization, and migration guides.

transport.description: Browser WebMCP tool registration is exposed on ant.design pages through navigator.modelContext when the user agent supports it.

tools.name: search-antd-docs
tools.description: Search Ant Design component documentation and return relevant documentation entry points.

query.description: The search query for Ant Design documentation.
